assertions.description: FedCM exposes the IdentityCredential interface; the iframe-origin UI change is a UI behaviour of the existing credential type.
navigator.credentials.get with an identity provider is the entry point that surfaces the FedCM UI that now shows iframe origins.
navigator.credentials.get is a function — the API surface FedCM rides on remains stable.
Iframes are the embedding surface this change is about; HTMLIFrameElement remains exposed so third-party embedders can host an IdP request.
The identity-credentials-get permissions-policy directive is what unlocks FedCM in a third-party iframe; the permissionsPolicy/featurePolicy surface exists to introspect it.
FedCM is restricted to secure contexts.
